I was looking for a pfp and found straight up porn 30 seconds later. Thanks google, I’m moving to Pinterest now ❤️

Was kinda hesitant on making a Tsuyu bot cause I don’t really understand her personality. But ig she is the one mha girl I’ve yet to do (besides the invisible one but I don’t think I plan to do her ever). If it’s out of character don’t be surprised.

Kinda wanna do a bot based on After Dark, but then again idk if I wanna support Mr. Diddy like that (even if some of his music is good).

Akaza bot next (maybe)? I might skip Akaza honestly, I’m pretty done with the Upper Moon series. I should probably get to working on requests anyways cause I have a lot to do.
